PostToolUse.description: Validate JSON syntax after config file edits

hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.json) if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 -m json.tool "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo '[Forgeline] Invalid JSON: '"$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python -m json.tool "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo '[Forgeline] Invalid JSON: '"$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; fi ;; esac
